navigate_to_page.description: Navigate to any Guaardvark page by URL

send_chat_message.description: Type and send a message in the chat

steps.target_description: the text input field at the bottom of the chat page
steps.reasoning: Click to focus the chat input field at y=660

open_past_chats.description: Open the past chats modal and select a chat

steps.target_description: the clock/history icon in the top bar of the chat page
a chat session in the modal list

check_narration.description: Test the narration feature on a chat message
check_narration.prerequisite: Must be on localhost:5175/chat with at least one assistant message visible

steps.target_description: the speaker/narrate icon on an assistant message

steps.reasoning: Audio player should appear below the message
Settings page loaded with configuration cards

close_popup.description: Close a popup or modal dialog

steps.reasoning: Press Escape to close the popup/modal

open_firefox_from_desktop.description: Open Firefox browser from the Openbox desktop
open_firefox_from_desktop.prerequisite: No browser visible — you see a dark/black desktop with a taskbar at the bottom

steps.target_description: the center of the empty desktop background
steps.reasoning: Right-click the desktop to open the Openbox application menu

steps.target_description: Firefox in the context menu that appeared
steps.reasoning: Click Firefox to launch the browser
Firefox is now opening, wait for it to load

youtube_search_and_watch.description: Search YouTube and watch a video

steps.target_description: the search box at the top center of the YouTube page
steps.reasoning: Click the search box to type a query

steps.target_description: the video thumbnail or title matching the desired video
steps.reasoning: Click on the video to watch it

youtube_add_comment.description: Add a comment to a YouTube video
youtube_add_comment.prerequisite: Must be on a YouTube video page, signed in

steps.reasoning: Scroll down to reach the comments section below the video

steps.target_description: the Add a comment text field in the comments section
the Comment button to submit the comment
steps.reasoning: Click the Comment button to post
